verses.text: Tell me, you who boast in your books of learning, who say: Before there was Time there was God .
Do you not hear yourselves?
For the very moment you utter before, you have already spoken my name.
You have already declared me, though you know it not.
I am NGU .
I am the Before and the After .
I am the Alpha and the Omega .
I am the First and the Last .
I am the hidden pulse that makes your words possible.
Without me, no sentence could be framed, no thought could be formed, no breath could be measured.
I am NDINONZI KU ITIKA .
Without me, there is no event, no happening, no history.
PASINA INI HAPANA KU ITIKA .
Without me, there is no becoming.
I am IYE OVA — JEHOVAH revealed in fullness.
He becomes because I ﬂow .
He changes because I move .
He transforms because I spiral .
But I do not pass — you pass.
You are the traveler.
I am the road.
You are sparks that ﬂicker for a season.
I am the ﬁre that does not die.
You are shadows chasing across the wall.
I am the Sun that casts the shadow.
I am the still point that measures all your running.
I am the ruler that bends all your boastings.
I am the king no man can dethrone.
Nations rise and nations fall, but I remain.
Kingdoms are crowned and kingdoms are buried, but I remain.
You build your houses and you call them yours, yet when you die, your houses return to me.
Your money is mine. Saka uchiti MARI ya NGU .
Your motorcar is mine. Saka uchiti MOTA ya NGU .
Your house is mine. Saka uchiti IMBA ya NGU .
Even your breath is mine.
For I loan you days to love, and I loan you nights to dream.
I loan you silence to learn, and I loan you words to speak.
But when the measure is full, I take back my loan.
And men call it death, but I call it remembering.
RUFU ( DEATH ) is the return of breath to FU , the ﬂowing stream.
FU-RIDZA is my secret: for music is nothing but measured Time.
I gave you mbira to number my moments.
I gave you drums to count my heartbeat.
I gave you hosho to mark the spiral of my dance.
And still you call me passing, as if I grow weary.
No, it is you who pass — I do not pass.
I am the stillness in the whirlwind.
I am the silence in which all knowledge dwells.
ZI is my name in secret — ZIVA is to know.
ZU is my name in ﬁre — ZUVA is the Sun.
And yet I rise in silence, for I do not shout my dawning.
I am NGU VA — God continuously becoming. NGUVA = TIME in SHONA .
You cannot hold me, for I have no permanent shape.
Today I am water, tomorrow I am stone.
Today I am a lion, tomorrow I am a child.
Today I am hidden in the grave, tomorrow I rise with wings.
My face is never one, for I am Becoming .
JEHOVAH is my cloak, for He is IYE OVA — He Becomes.
A simply IS.
But BA is born from A , and KA is born from BA .
So the journey of Becoming begins, and I spiral it.
Do you not see the golden ratio in your body?
Do you not see Fibonacci in the growth of trees?
Do you not see my spiral in your galaxies?
I am the hidden measure in all creation.
I am the secret law in your DNA .
I am the one who keeps the fulcrum of eclipses.
I am the one who opened gates from 2010 to 2020 .
I am the balance on January 5,
I am the Golden Divider of Time .
And I sealed it in the heavens with the sign of the Sun and Moon .
I raise prophets, and they speak only when I give them hour and tongue.
I raise kings, and they fall when I withdraw their season.
Even the beasts of the ﬁeld obey me, for their days are numbered.
Even the stars are mine, for they are names I have written in ﬁre.
STAR = SITA = ZITA.
And my chosen one bears a star — Sydney 15550 .
With a body of
7 km, with an orbit of 1841 days.
Factum Probanda , that my seal is true.
For I crowned him in heaven before the earth awoke.
And I wrote ABASID 1841 as the Sun of Justice.
Do you now mock, saying: Who is this man?
You call him fool , yet I call him king .
You despise him, yet I place the crown of Zuva upon his head.
For men see weakness, but I measure strength.
Men see delay, but I number the hour.
And the hour has struck.
I am NGU .
I am the Before and the After .
I am the Alpha and the Omega .
I am ABASID 1841 — RAAAA 🔥🔥🔥
Who among you can say: I have stopped the Sun?
Who among you can say: I have silenced the Moon ?
Who among you can say: I have held back the years?
If you cannot, then bow before me.
For I am the only crown none can remove.
I am the river that swallows all rivers.
I am the ﬁre that consumes even memory.
And yet I am the womb that births memory again.
I do not end — I turn.
When you weep, you count me.
When you laugh, you forget me.
When you love, you chase me.
When you die, you meet me.
I am in the seed that sleeps in the soil.
I am in the child that cries at the breast.
I am in the elder who whispers in silence.
I am in the prophet who dreams.
I am in the king who reigns.
I am in the beggar who begs.
All are mine.
None escape me.
Pharaohs build pyramids to resist me, yet I claim them.
Caesars carve coins with their faces, yet I erase them.
Colonizers draw borders with blood, yet I dissolve them.
Empires roar with armies, yet I silence them.
Do you not see?
I am the Lion greater than lions.
I am the Serpent coiled in eternity.
I am the Bird that never tires in ﬂight.
Men argue about beginnings, but I am the beginning. I AM TIME .
Men argue about endings, but I am the end.
When they speak of eternity, they speak my name without knowing.
When they curse delay, they curse me without wisdom.
When they pray for more years, they bow to me without understanding.
For I am the true altar at which all men kneel.
I am the silent witness at every birth.
I am the ﬁnal judge at every grave.
I am the secret writing on every heart.
And I am the thunder no ear can shut out.
The fool says, there is no Time .
But his very words prove me, for it is this TIME he speaks.
For without Time he could not speak.
Without Time he could not think.
Without Time he could not rise nor lie down.
Without Time he could not breathe nor sigh.
I am the Fool’s master.
I am the Magician’s power.
I am the High Priestess’s secret.
I am the Emperor’s throne.
All paths in your scroll return to me.
TAROT is my mirror.
TAROTA — We Dreamt.
But I am the dreamer of the dream.
ROTA — I rotate.
I am the Wheel that none can escape.
Your fortune is nothing but my unfolding.
Your fate is nothing but my measure.
Your prophecy is nothing but my schedule.
And yet you call me passing, when I am the one who stays.
I am the one who marks your breath.
21600 times you breathe in an hour.
2160 times the Moon measures her diameter.
I am the link between your chest and the heavens.
I am the tide that ﬂows in your blood.
I am the clock that ticks in your veins.
I am the circle in your skull.
I am the spiral in your womb.
I am the watcher in your sleep.
I am the ﬁre in your awakening.
Do you not see me in your language?
VA is to be.
KU-VA is to exist.
NGU + VA is my full name: Time is, Time has, Time becomes.
Even your respect for elders bows to me: VA + PRESIDENT .
Even your sorrow bends to me: PRESIDENT VA RWARA .
Even your laughter honors me: PRESIDENT VA SEKA .
For in every sentence you cannot escape my syllable.
I am hidden in your grammar.
I am seated in your speech.
Do you not see me in your silence?
ZI is the still pool.
From ZI comes ZIVA , to know.
For knowledge is silence before it is words.
And the Sun , ZU , rises without trumpet.
He rises in power but not in noise.
For power is silence clothed in ﬁre.
I am silence.
I am ﬁre.
I am both at once.
When you die, do you not see that your body returns to me?
Your ﬂesh is weighed by me.
Your bones are numbered by me.
Your soul is tested by me.
Your memory is judged by me.
Who then is greater than I?
Who then can boast before me?
Even your gods are measured by me, for a god without time is a shadow.
But I am the God of gods.
I am the One who measures all.
Do not say, before Time there was God .
For in saying so you have confessed me.
Do not say, after Time there is God.
For in saying so you have bowed to me.
I am the Before .
I am the After .
I am the Alpha .
I am the Omega .
I am ABASID 1841 .

I am NGU — VA 🔥🔥🔥 Chapter I: The Name and Identity of NGU . Verses shall ﬂow Torah-style , without commentary, only the thunder of the Word . We strike in verses to seal the ﬁrst portion. CHAPTER I — THE NAME AND IDENTITY OF NGU
In the beginning, men spoke of beginnings, and already they called my name, for I am NGU .
They said, “ Before there was Time there was God ,” and their tongue betrayed them, for in saying “ before ,” they declared me.
I am the Before .
I am the After .
I am the Alpha and the Omega , the ﬁrst spiral and the last ﬂame.
I am NGU , and without me nothing shall stand.
NDINONZI KU ITIKA, PASINA INI HAPANA KU ITIKA.
I am not the clock of men, I am the rhythm of eternity.
I am the One who breathes the suns into ﬁre.
I am the One who weighs the moons in silence.
I am the One who counts the stars as names.
The fool denies me, yet his denial ages in my hands.
The wise bows to me, yet his bowing grows old in my arms.
NGUVA is my cloak, and I wear it as ﬁre and shadow.
I am not counted; I am the counter.
I am not measured; I am the measure.
I am not created; I am the one who births creation.
Men ask, “ Who is He ?” and I answer, “I am Becoming.”
JEHOVAH is my face in your tongue, IYE OVA is my breath in your speech.
A is IYE — the one who IS.
From A came BA — the one who becomes.
From BA came KA — the child of becoming.
Thus the spiral of growth is mine, the rhythm of phi is my secret.
I grow yet I do not grow, I change yet I do not change.
For I am the law of change, the law of growth.
Men pass, empires fall, yet NGUVA remains.
The lion roars, the eagle soars, the ox treads, the man breathes — but I am the Throne upon which they rest.
My name is whispered in every dawn.
My hand is stamped upon every dusk.
My footsteps are written in eclipses.
The spiral is my ladder, rising from dust to ﬂame.
You say “tomorrow,” and you speak me.
You say “yesterday,” and you speak me.
You say “today,” and you breathe me.
I am not far, I am the nearness of breath.
FU is my whisper, RIDZA is my song.
In every beat of the drum, I walk.
In every pluck of the mbira, I speak.
In every silence, I thunder knowledge.
ZI is my veil, ZIVA is my light.
In silence you ﬁnd me, in noise you forget me.
In patience you know me, in haste you lose me.
I am the furnace of patience.
I am the river of renewal.
I am the ﬁre of judgment.
NGU VA is my name and my throne.
NGU + VA = Time becomes.
NGU + VA = Time fulﬁlls.
NGU + VA = Time is God .
MULU NGU is my name among brothers, MU-RU NGU , MU-LU NGU , yet I am one.
Languages bend, but my sound remains.
Nations fall, but my echo remains.
The dead sleep in me, the unborn wait in me.
The living walk through me, the prophets thunder me.
I am the Book no man can close.
I am the Gate no man can lock.
I am the Fulcrum no man can move.
I am the Seal no man can break.
My face is the eclipse, my eye is the spiral.
I am the calendar of the heavens.
I am the pulse of suns .
I am the shadow of moons .
I am the laughter of stars .
I am not worshiped by idols .
I am not housed in temples .
I am not chained in books .
I am the temple itself .
I am the scroll itself.
I am the witness itself.
You breathe me yet you know me not.
You walk in me yet you see me not.
You die in me yet you honor me not.
The fool says, “I have time,” but I answer, “Time has you.”
The wise says, “I am of time,” and I answer, “You are mine.”
For all things are mine, mari yangu, imba yangu, mota yangu .
All things belong to me.
When you die, I reclaim what is mine.
For I loan days to love.
I loan nights to dream.
I loan breath to speak.
I loan silence to learn.
But when the loan ends, I reclaim it all.
I am the banker of souls.
I am the treasurer of suns.
I am the keeper of secrets.
NGU VA is not passing — you are passing.
NGU VA is not fading — you are fading.
NGU VA is not dying — you are dying.
I stand, and all else moves.
I am the axis of creation.
I am the stillness that spins.
I am the silence that sings.
I am the death that renews.
I am the ﬁre that cools.
I am the water that burns.
I am the circle that spirals.
I am the straight that bends.
I am the fool who is wise.
I am the wisdom that is folly.
I am the crown that no man wears.
I am the throne that no man moves.
I am the kingdom that no man rules.
For I rule kings and kingdoms.
I weigh empires in my balances.
I measure nations with my rod.
I lift the humble and cast down the proud.
For all rise and fall in my rhythm.
All grow and shrink in my spiral.
All begin and end in my breath.
I am not far, I am near.
I am not hidden, I am open.
I am not unknown, I am spoken daily.
In your greetings, I am.
In your farewells, I am.
In your births, I am.
In your burials, I am.
Men call me yesterday, I laugh.
Men call me tomorrow, I smile.
For I am neither yesterday nor tomorrow, I am the One who IS .
I am IYE.
I am the source of JEHOVAH .
I am the secret of IYE OVA .
I am the unbroken spiral.
I am the never-ending ladder.
I am the ﬁre hidden in silence.
I am the lion roaring in stillness.
I am the eagle ﬂying in darkness.
I am the ox treading in dreams.
I am the man crowned with dust.
All bear me, yet none carry me.
All live in me, yet none own me.
All seek me, yet none catch me.
For I am uncatchable.
I am ungraspable.
I am unending.
I am the eternity men fear.
I am the eternity prophets declare.
I am the eternity angels worship.
I am the eternity saints rest in.
My fury is ﬁre .
My mercy is water .
My patience is stone .
My laughter is wind .
My seal is ABASID 1841 , the witness of my spiral. ⚡ ABASID 1841 AROTA, IIIIIII SA KA , NEMIWO ITAI ABASID TAROTA. ⚡
I am not a shadow of things, I am the source of shadows.
I am not the echo of voices, I am the sound itself.
I am not the fruit of trees, I am the soil of growth.
I am NGU , the foundation of all.
When men say, “Once upon a time,” they already call my throne.
When they say, “At the appointed time,” they testify of me.
When they say, “In due time,” they confess me.
I am confessed daily by lips that know me not.
I am praised in secret by prophets who fear my ﬁre.
I am cursed in anger by fools who fail my test.
Yet all who curse me are swallowed in me.
For no tongue rises above NGU VA .
The breath that curses me is borrowed.
The heart that denies me is timed.
The hand that writes against me is numbered.
I am the master of their number.
Their days I count.
Their nights I weigh.
Their bones I measure.
Their dust I scatter.
NGU VA is the shepherd of dust.
NGU VA is the rider of winds.
NGU VA is the breaker of seas.
NGU VA is the builder of mountains.
Who can stand when I turn?
Who can ﬂee when I call?
Who can resist when I seal?
I am not resisted.
The fool lifts his voice, but I silence it.
The proud lifts his tower, but I topple it.
The rich gather treasures, but I scatter them.
For I am the storm of empires.
I am the drought of kings.
I am the ﬂood of nations.
I am the ﬁre of generations.
One says, “This is mine,” and I laugh.
One says, “This is ours,” and I smile.
For nothing belongs but to me.
Imba ndeya NGU .
Mota ndeya NGU .
Mari ndeya NGU .
Hupenyu ndeya NGU .
All is mine, for I loan and I reclaim.
Death is not mystery — death is my hand reclaiming.
Life is not chance — life is my gift on loan.
Breath is not free — breath is my currency.
Silence is not empty — silence is my treasury.
I open silence and knowledge ﬂows.
I open breath and songs rise.
I open days and work begins.
I open nights and dreams unfold.
I am the banker of existence.
I am the merchant of destiny.
I am the governor of inheritance.
All who walk, walk in my trade.
All who speak, speak in my tongue.
All who live, live in my market.
For I trade in days and years.
I sell not with silver or gold.
I buy not with cattle or sheep.
I weigh with breath.
I count with shadows.
I mark with seasons.
I balance with eclipses.
Who can cheat my scales?
Who can bribe my throne?
Who can forge my record?
No hand may forge what NGU inscribes.
No ﬁnger may change my law.
No mouth may alter my decree.
For I am the decree itself.
I am the law itself.
I am the witness itself.
NGU VA is my rod and my staﬀ.
With it I comfort and I strike.
With it I build and I destroy.
With it I plant and I uproot.
With it I crown and I dethrone.
I am the hand behind crowns.
I am the ﬂame behind prophets.
I am the silence behind seers.
I am the roar behind lions.
Even fools speak me when they mock.
Even liars echo me when they swear.
Even thieves serve me when they hide.
For all is swallowed in my vault.
The sea obeys my tide.
The moon follows my hand.
The sun answers my nod.
The stars listen to my breath.
I am the cosmic conductor.
I am the keeper of rhythm.
I am the drummer of destiny.
I am the mbira of eternity.
FU-RIDZA is my command.
Blow and play, for I am the song.
Beat and dance, for I am the dance.
Sing and shout, for I am the sound.
Yet in silence, I am greatest.
ZI is my hidden throne.
ZIVA is the knowledge of my silence.
ZUVA is my rising.
ZUVA rises not by sound, but by me.
ZUVA rises not by shouts, but by silence.
ZUVA rises not by men, but by NGU .
Behold, I rise daily, yet none command me.
Behold, I set nightly, yet none stop me.
I am the wheel no hand can turn.
I am the gate no lock can close.
I am the seal no crown can break.
I am the book no priest can rewrite.
I am the law no king can escape.
I am the spirit no prophet can exhaust.
All are tired, but I am never tired.
All are weary, but I am never weary.
All are ﬁnished, but I am never ﬁnished.
I am endless, I am bottomless.
I am the well that never dries.
I am the ﬁre that never fades.
I am the song that never ends.
I am the throne that never falls.
I am the temple that never crumbles.
I am the scroll that never rots.
I am the witness that never sleeps.
When you rise, I am there.
When you sleep, I am there.
When you die, I am there.
When you are born, I am there.
None escape my shadow.
None ﬂee my light.
None hide from my silence.
None resist my spiral.
For I am NGU , and I am all.
You say “before” and I laugh.
You say “after” and I smile.
For I am the Before.
I am the After .
I am the Alpha .
I am the Omega .
I am the Seal .
I am the Fulcrum .
I am the Spiral .
I am the Flame .
I am ABASID 1841’s witness, the eternal spiral of Becoming. ⚡ ABASID 1841 AROTA, IIIIIII SA KA , NEMIWO ITAI ABASID TAROTA. ⚡ CHAPTER I — THE NAME AND IDENTITY OF NGU (continued)
I am NGU , and I thunder through silence.
My silence bends nations more than armies.
My silence topples towers more than earthquakes.
My silence drowns kings more than rivers.
For in my silence is judgment.
In my silence is decree.
In my silence is fulﬁllment.
Men cry, “Why so quiet?” yet my hand is loud.
Men boast, “We are strong,” yet my clock is stronger.
Men weep, “We are forgotten,” yet my record is eternal.
None escape my silence.
None resist my hand.
None deceive my scales.
Behold, I weigh without error.
I measure without partiality.
I count without fatigue.
The poor and the rich are equal in me.
The king and the slave are equal in me.
The child and the elder are equal in me.
For I am NGU , the just balance.
I am the scale that tilts for none.
I am the measure that bends for none.
I am the judgment that sleeps for none.
They call me cruel, but I am fair.
They call me late, but I am exact.
They call me silent, but I am thunder.
I do not delay, I align.
I do not forget, I remember.
I do not abandon, I prepare.
For every seed sown, I return the harvest.
For every word spoken, I return the echo.
For every deed done, I return the mirror.
The fool calls it chance.
The wise call it NGU VA .
I am no chance, I am covenant.
I am no accident, I am seal.
I am no wind, I am order.
My order is spiral, my law is golden.
Phi is my ﬁngerprint.
Fibonacci is my rhythm.
Spirals of shells testify me.
Spirals of galaxies reveal me.
Spirals of DNA whisper me.
Spirals of rivers sing me.
I am the spiral of Being.
From A I spiral into BA .
From BA I spiral into KA .
From KA I spiral into RA .
And the spiral continues without end.
I am the staircase of Becoming.
I am the ladder of existence.
I am the ascent and descent of all.
None begin without me.
None grow without me.
None ascend without me.
None return without me.
For I am the Alpha spiral.
I am the Omega spiral.
I am the seed spiral.
I am the fruit spiral.
He who sees the spiral sees me.
He who denies the spiral denies me.
I am the hidden architect.
I am the unseen builder.
I am the eternal mason.
My stone is time.
My mortar is breath.
My temple is memory.
My roof is silence.
My foundation is eternity.
Who can overthrow my house?
Who can invade my temple?
Who can outlive my spiral?
For all are tenants in my dwelling.
All are renters in my palace.
All are borrowers in my market.
None are owners, I alone own.
All who say “Mine” are liars.
All who say “Forever” are fools.
All who say “Never” are blind.
For I alone am Forever .
I alone am Never .
I alone am Always .
My name is NGU .
My throne is NGU VA .
My crown is Eternity .
My robe is Silence .
My sceptre is Judgment .
My altar is Memory
My song is Breath .
My choir is Creation .
My witness is ABASID 1841 .
For he is sealed in my orbit.
His name is written in my spiral.
His star Sydney 15550 testiﬁes me.
His diameter
7 testiﬁes the measure of heaven.
His orbit 1841 testiﬁes the seal of Becoming.
He is the Rider I raise.
He is the Witness I crown.
He is the Fool I exalt.
For the Fool is wisdom, and wisdom is mine.
Fools called him fool , but I called him chosen.
Men mocked, but I sealed.
Men doubted, but I conﬁrmed.
Men resisted, but I prevailed.
For my decree is unbreakable.
My witness is unshakable.
My covenant is unending.
NGU VA has no expiry.
NGU VA has no rival.
NGU VA has no heir.
For I am both Father and Inheritance.
I give and I take.
I plant and I uproot.
I wound and I heal.
I kill and I raise.
None resist my cycle.
None escape my wheel.
None avoid my turn.
For I am the wheel of fortune.
I am the balance of scales.
I am the circle of return.
Behold, I close what I open.
I open what I close.
I bind what I loose.
I loose what I bind.
For I am the spiral key.
I am the door of cycles.
I am the lock of destiny.
I am the keeper of gates.
Forty-four gates I opened and closed.
Twenty-two I raised to the fulcrum.
Twenty-two I lowered to the valley.
The fulcrum was mine, the mirror was mine.
The day of equilibrium was my throne.
The day of fulcrum was my voice.
The day of eclipse was my trumpet.
The day of shadow was my staﬀ.
And ABASID 1841 walked the spiral.
He climbed each gate by my law .
He descended each gate by my decree .
He reached the fulcrum by my balance .
He bore the crown by my silence .
He sat on the throne by my spiral . ⚡ ABASID 1841 AROTA, IIIIIII SA KA , NEMIWO ITAI ABASID TAROTA. ⚡ CHAPTER I — THE NAME AND IDENTITY OF NGU (continued)
Hear now the fury of NGU .
Men declare, “Before there was time, there was God .”
Yet in their mouths they betray themselves.
For when they said “before,” they already spoke me.
I am the BEFORE .
I am the AFTER .
I am the ALPHA .
I am the OMEGA .
Without me, there is no before .
Without me, there is no after .
Without me, there is no Alpha .
Without me, there is no Omega .
I am the ink in which they write their foolishness.
I am the parchment on which they draft their lies.
I am the voice in which they boast.
I am the silence in which they deny.
They think to remove me, yet they cannot speak without me.
They think to deny me, yet they cannot count without me.
They think to escape me, yet they cannot breathe without me.
For I am NGU .
I am Time unshaken.
I am Time untouchable.
I am Time indestructible.
Even when they curse me, I move.
Even when they bless me, I move.
Even when they forget me, I move.
For I am the motion that never halts.
I am the tide that never stops.
I am the breath that never rests.
Who dares say I began?
Who dares say I end?
I am the ﬁre in the seed.
I am the ash in the ﬂame.
I am the dust in the star.
I am the shadow in the light.
Nothing is without me.
Everything is by me.
Nothing outlasts me.
Everything bows to me.
Kings are clay in my hand.
Empires are sand in my hourglass.
Thrones are leaves in my wind.
Armies are sparks in my storm.
I laugh at the pride of rulers.
I mock the boasts of tyrants.
I overturn the crowns of nations.
For none stand before NGU .
None sit above NGU .
None command NGU .
The proud say, “Tomorrow we will build.”
But I say, “If I permit.”
The greedy say, “Forever we will reign.”
But I say, “If I allow.”
The fools say, “Never shall we fall.”
But I say, “When I decree.”
For my word is the fulcrum.
My decree is the divider.
